name: Emma Laurent
title: Emma Laurent

stats.label: Agility
stats.description: Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit Damage

basic.name: Sword of Revenge
basic.description: Emma thrusts at the enemy with her flaming sword.

core.name: Flare Strike
core.description: Emma attacks with a flaming strike. Applies [Burn] (damage equal to 17.77% of Max HP every 3 seconds for 30 seconds) and inflicts [Airborne] on hit.

skill.name: Burn Up
skill.description: Emma attacks with a fiery swing. Deals medium Break damage. Bonus 10% damage against [Burned] targets.

skill.name: Flame Cleave
skill.description: Emma slashes with a powerful condensed flame. Deals heavy Break damage with [Airborne] effect. Bonus 10% damage against [Burned] targets.

support.name: Roaring Flames
support.description: Emma unleashes roaring flames. Applies [Flame's Blessing] and [Flame's Wrath] effects.

qte.name: Flame Judgment
qte.description: Emma executes a flame-infused judgment strike.

ultimate.name: Burning Pride
ultimate.description: Emma releases her full burning pride in a devastating flaming attack.

passive.name: Heat Absorption / Heat Emission
passive.description: Emma builds [Heat Absorption] stacks from combat actions (Basic Attacks or taking damage: 2 instances; Core Attack, Burn Up, Flame Judgment, or Extreme Evasion: 5 instances; Burning Pride: 10 instances). At 5 stacks: Defense +7.77%. At 10 stacks: recovers HP equal to 7.77% of damage taken. At 15 stacks: gains a Shield equal to 7.77% of Max HP (duration 15 seconds). When Heat Emission activates, Heat Absorption instances are removed. [Heat Emission] at 5 stacks: Defense Penetration +7.77%. At 10 stacks: Fire damage +7.77%. At 15 stacks: Fire damage +7.77% applied to team members (duration 20 seconds).

advancements: Increases the Break damage of Burn Up by 77.77%.
Increases the user's Break effect by 10%. Increases damage dealt to targets affected by the Break effect by 20%.
Grants [Heat Absorption] to team members. Applies 5 instances of [Heat Absorption] when entering the stage.

When the target enters the Break state, resets the cooldown of all skills. Recovers Core Gauge and Power Gauge by 100%. Applies a Damage Increase effect granting 77.77% increased damage for 15 seconds.
